description: Proportional fixed costs allocated to spas by revenue ratio. These are centrally purchased items distributed based on each spa's share of total weekly revenue. Add new cost items as needed.

cost_items.name: Towels
cost_items.notes: Enter weekly cost in Raw - Fixed Costs tab

cost_items.name: Linens
cost_items.notes: Enter weekly cost in Raw - Fixed Costs tab

cost_items.name: Slippers
cost_items.notes: Enter weekly cost in Raw - Fixed Costs tab

notes: Amounts are read dynamically from the 'Raw - Fixed Costs' Google Sheet tab each week. To add a new proportional cost, add it both here and as a row in the Google Sheet tab. All items are allocated by revenue ratio — no other method is currently supported for these costs.
